allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if '68' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); providers=d.get\('providers',{}\); [print\(k, providers[k].get\('api',''\), providers[k].get\('baseUrl',''\)\) for k in providers if 'mini' in k.lower\(\) or 'max' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in p.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('name:', d['name']\); print\('private:', d.get\('private','not set'\)\)")
